subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up — it was great connecting at the conference. We'd be happy to schedule a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

Are you available for a 30-minute call during any of the following windows?
- Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which slot works best for you.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our senior leadership — I'm unable to share internal contact information for personnel. For publicly available contact options, please refer to our website.

Thanks,

Best regards
